data/maps/LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F.LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trai: I think POKéMON get closer to their\nTRAINERS if they spend time together.\pThe longer the better.\nThat's what I think.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F.LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_HotS: I gave a RED {POKEBLOCK} to my POKéMON.\nIt looks a lot cooler all of a sudden.\pHmm...\nMaybe I ought to eat a RED {POKEBLOCK}.
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F.LavaridgeTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Trai: Hohoho! Hey, kid, you can reach\nthe hot springs from here.\pIf POKéMON are getting rest, so too\nshould their TRAINERS.
